title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_7b1dff59.jpg)

2. **Medico**
*2026*
Medieval traveling barbers on their way to becoming a famous medicus.
![Medico](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_ff092466.jpg)

3. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_3fc9bfc7.jpg)

4. **Excalibur**
*2026*
Compete, connive, and outwit your rivals to claim Excalibur as your own.
![Excalibur](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_3a76176f.jpg)

5. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_bad93c9a.jpg)

6. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_a5166116.png)

7. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_42c9f7a5.png)

8. **Friendly Fishing**
*2026*
A casual day on the pond. Catch some nice fish and help your buddy catch some too.
![Friendly Fishing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_5dd23633.jpg)

9. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_94d30da0.jpg)

10. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_ee87b20e.jpg)

11. **Rebirth**
*2024*
Rebuild old lands in a lush, hopeful future.
![Rebirth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_ef289bc4.png)

12. **dnup**
*2025*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_14317de5.jpg)

13. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_dc5da88b.png)

14. **Nemesis: Retaliation**
*2025*
Highly trained marines enter an alien nest with strict orders and advanced tools.
![Nemesis: Retaliation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_d9081f1f.jpg)

15. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_5eea276e.jpg)

16. **Deep Regrets**
*2025*
A game about fishing progressively more horrifying things out of the ocean.
![Deep Regrets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_a9b021a1.jpg)

17. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_147d29d8.png)

18. **Vantage**
*2025*
Explore an entire planet's open world from a first-person perspective.
![Vantage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_663fa92b.jpg)

19. **The Isle of Penguins**
*2027*
Rescue as many penguins as you can before the ice melts and their home is lost.
![The Isle of Penguins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_6885e970.jpg)

20. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_d7dd8b35.jpg)

21. **Feya's Swamp**
*2025*
Rise as the most prosperous clan in this magical swamp.
![Feya's Swamp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_c3bb6fea.png)

22. **Stonesaga**
*2026*
Cooperative survival crafting board game set in a unique and persistent world.
![Stonesaga](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_db5c8b3a.jpg)

23. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_b962c7ec.jpg)

24. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_c1ed0806.jpg)

25. **Panda Spin**
*2024*
Play cards to win tricks...or lose tricks to get better cards into your hand.
![Panda Spin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_3d0ee19f.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*17 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_9ed941ef.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*25 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_75f1c39b.jpg)

3. **Ark Nova**
*53 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_d105442d.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*20 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_0deaf4c3.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*89 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_5b21a76e.jpg)

6. **Azul**
*103 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_d06ffcb8.png)

7. **Bomb Busters**
*13 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_aa01df49.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*116 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_07f8cf41.jpg)

9. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*35 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_93b5f2c9.jpg)

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*42 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_4e91c921.jpg)

11. **Cascadia**
*58 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_7caa0f94.jpg)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*32 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_590f31aa.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*4 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_577beace.jpg)

14. **Faraway**
*25 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_a3831598.png)

15. **The Gang**
*11 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_6b89ca3e.jpg)

16. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*65 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_14f3c51b.jpg)

17. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*18 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_75a263e0.jpg)

18. **Sky Team**
*32 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_235f4464.jpg)

19. **Magical Athlete**
*4 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_f51a16e2.png)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*11 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_b31d5e4b.jpg)

21. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*5 months on the list*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_5ddf8a23.png)

22. **Carcassonne**
*275 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_dcccd270.jpg)

23. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*1 months on the list*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_6cb83998.jpg)

24. **Toy Battle**
*3 months on the list*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_8f6dbde4.jpg)

25. **SCOUT**
*42 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-07/toplist/bgg_8cef40da.png)
